name: Chinese Spicy Chicken (Le Tze Gee)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into boneless cubes.
2. Mix sherry, soy sauce, and cornstarch in a bowl.
3. Marinate the chicken in the cornstarch mixture for 15 minutes.
4. Heat oil in a pan.
5. Add the marinated chicken to the pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Remove the chicken from the pan.
7. Add diced bamboo shoots, hoison sauce, chopped scallions, grated ginger, and crushed red pepper to the pan.
8. Stir well until everything is combined.
9. Return the chicken to the pan and serve.
